scripts.check: node -e "const{execFileSync}=require('node:child_process');const{readdirSync}=require('node:fs');const path=require('node:path');const files=['tests/vitest.config.js'];for(const dir of['packages/core/src','examples/src','tests/src','scripts'])for(const e of readdirSync(dir,{recursive:true,withFileTypes:true}))if(e.isFile()&&e.name.endsWith('.js'))files.push(path.join(e.parentPath,e.name));for(const f of files)execFileSync(process.execPath,['--check',f],{stdio:'inherit'});console.log('check: '+files.length+' files parse')"
